suggestions.summary: Auto-detected from press: "The Himachal Pradesh government has cleared financial assistance of Rs 16.76 crore for 113 families running shops and other businesses on government land affect" — review the linked article and edit before promoting.

methodology: Keyword scan of press snapshot. False positives are normal — a signed-in moderator reviews each before promotion. Categories: incident, defect, audit, grievance, litigation.
